tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe zdania (1.1.–1.10.), wybierając właściwy wariant odpowiedzi. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.stem: _______ Sahara is the largest hot desert in the world.
She plays _______ violin in the school orchestra.
There are _______ apples left. We need to buy more.
_______ of the students passed the exam. The teacher was delighted.
He is _______ honest person and always tells the truth.
I have _______ idea what you're talking about.
We go to _______ church every Sunday.
_______ student must bring their own textbook.
She earns _______ money than her brother.
